subcodes.title: Words to some Theosophists, spoken on 1913-04-20
subcodes.first_line: I was most pleased to present myself in your midst and speak with you; a meeting which believes in the spiritual power
subcodes.first_line_orig: من بسیار مسرُورم از اینکه در این انجمن حاضر شدم این انجمنیست که اعضایش معتقد بروحانیّاتند
subcodes.subjects: @Theosophy, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @call to action
